[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000101 2
1 1011010 4
2 0001000 1
3 0000101 2
4 0011111 5
5 0000010 1
6 0000110 2
7 0100100 2

01 10 0011101 4

23 32 0100011 3

67 76 0000001 1
70 07 0000011 2

24 42 1111110 6
35 53 0001000 1 match 2
46 64 1000111 4

60 06 0000010 1 match 5
71 17 0011110 4

14 41 1011000 3

47 74 1000110 3
50 05 0010000 1
61 16 0011111 5 match 4
72 27 0111000 3

37 73 0011011 4
